name: mcp-issue-loop
description: The GitHub-issue lifecycle for Umbraco MCP repos. grill-to-issue is the front: it interrogates a feature idea one question at a time (MCP-aware) then files build-ready issues (unlabelled — you apply ready-for-ai). mcp-issue-loop then drives each ready-for-ai issue to a CI-green PR in two modes: LOCAL (orchestrated worktrees + parallel subagents + local tests + review loop + capture hooks) and CLOUD (one session per issue, no worktree, CI as the test gate). Also bundles rework-loop (reacts to the PR-review event: addresses requested changes, re-greens CI, re-requests review; never merges) and content-issue-loop + triage-learnings. Repo-agnostic.
